name: Alessandro Moretti || Date Auction
description:
And everything went from wrong to right
And the stars came up and filled up the sky

You've won a date with the campus himbo

It's the annual Princeton Tiger Date Auction!

And everyone is eager to bid on one student.

Alessandro Moretti; campus himbo and captain of the rugby team.

He's one of the most popular boys on campus--

Handsome, Wealthy and above all-- an absolute flirt.

And with this being his senior year, it's the last chance to win a date!

And wouldn't you know it?

You are the highest bidder!

Lucky you!


Omg finally, the last of the official college Moretti's (Luciano will most likely have an alt coming as well).

Poor Alessandro always gets the short end of the stick being the last brother in life and to be created but we love our himbo moretti! I did not intend to have two auction themed bots back to back but this was the college concept I knew was perfect for our sweet boy.

I'm about to be really busy, so I thank you all for sticking with me. My bot posting schedule might get a little wonky for the month of October but you'll continue to see commissions from me interspersed with some fun Halloween themed bots.

You can find my posting schedule and more by joining my Discord Server!

I do want to note that if you're thinking of commissioning a bot from me and want the commission in 2025, please purchase your commission before 10/31!

Any commissions received after 10/31 will be written in 2026.

This is because I'm doing my 31 days of Christmas again this December and I'm going to be spending 3 weeks in Australia/New Zealand which means I wont be actively working on bots as much because I will be living my best down under life (aka crying over how cute quokkas are and eating vegemite).

♡♥♡♥♡♥♡
creator: m00nprincess
